events.summary: Meta-feature stress test opened. Backup snapshotted to ~/Documents/FitTracker2-backups/2026-05-07-pre-roadmap-stress-test/ (55 state.json files + repo HEADs + master plan + CLAUDE + MEMORY). Case study + data-collection ledger scaffolded for live capture. Q3 isolation opt-out documented (meta-feature only — sub-features auto-isolate normally).

research.md = canonical sequenced roadmap with 9 sub-features + DS Residual cross-references + per-step time estimates. 3 hypotheses (H1 throughput, H2 overhead, H3 telemetry) pre-registered in data-collection.json with operationalization.

Experiment closed at session-natural halt. 1 sub-feature shipped (S3-G2 fitme-story PR #58 squash 8e595b3); 1 already-complete pre-session (S2); 1 partial blocked-external (S1); 6 not-started. 8 v7.9 protocol candidates surfaced (F1-F8). 0 kill criteria breached. Total wall time ~92 min. PRD-vs-execution gap analysis written in case study §99. Backup retained at ~/Documents/FitTracker2-backups/2026-05-07-pre-roadmap-stress-test/.
